hooks.command: root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)"; [ -f "$root/HANDOVER.md" ] && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"A HANDOVER.md is present at the repo root: a child has returned. Ingest it FIRST per the handover skill (read it, act on the chatter, promote any standing item to TODO, then delete) before responding to the user."}}'; exit 0
